body.title: Fix granny rules engine tests: patch _dispatch_cc0 which no longer exists
body.result: 9 TestRunOnce tests updated: _dispatch_cc0 → _dispatch_bus with imap=MagicMock(); all 23 tests pass
body.intention: I intend that the 9 TestRunOnce tests in test_granny_rules_engine.py use actual dispatch functions (_dispatch_bus, _dispatch_akien) instead of the deleted _dispatch_cc0.
body.description:
9 tests in tests/test_granny_rules_engine.py patch devices.granny.daemon._dispatch_cc0 which was removed when bus dispatch replaced the tmux_send_keys path. Pre-existing; confirmed by stash-and-run.

Failing tests (all in TestRunOnce): test_skips_when_worker_unavailable, test_skips_cc0_when_busy, test_dispatches_to_cc0_via_send_keys, test_dispatch_failure_does_not_raise, test_guru_ticket_dispatches_to_akien_not_cc_or_ds, test_dispatch_cc0_marks_ticket_in_progress, test_one_at_a_time_prevents_second_dispatch_same_cycle, test_high_inertia_ticket_routes_to_cc_not_dicksimnel, test_escalated_ticket_routes_to_cc_not_dicksimnel.

**Affected files:** tests/test_granny_rules_engine.py
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** IN: update tests to patch _dispatch_bus (with FakeIMAP or MagicMock) instead of _dispatch_cc0. OUT: changing daemon.py.
**Completion criteria:** All 9 tests pass. No new failures introduced.
